name: sistema-tickets-inventario
description: Sistema interno local para gestión de tickets e inventario con Express, React, PostgreSQL y Prisma.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/server && npm run lint -w apps/client
